rows.label: tev001893_MSG0001
rows.name: Ch-Chief![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0002
rows.name: Guess the cat's outta the bag, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_JNK0010
rows.name: Interrogate

rows.label: tev001893_SEL0011
rows.name: Demand to know if Miia killed those men.

rows.label: tev001893_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: tev001893_SEL0021
rows.name: Make sure that Miia is not hurt.

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0003
rows.name:
Killed? No! Not really. Just taught
'em a little lesson. Their Blue Bloods
are a lot tougher than they look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0004
rows.name:
Don't worry about me. I'm a full-fledged
BLADE who was trained by the best!
By which I mean you, Chief.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0005
rows.name:
I guess I can tell you what happened
now. I've been on a deep-cover operation.
Super cloak-and-dagger-type stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0006
rows.name:
And the client was Sakuraba Industries themselves!
They wanted me to snare some group who was trying
to steal information about their new weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0007
rows.name:
If the information had leaked to a rival
company— or worse, one of our enemies—it
would have been a really bad scene.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0008
rows.name:
We were having our first meeting about
the job when you ran into me that
night in the residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0009
rows.name:
And when you saw me in the commercial
district, that was when they were
having me steal the intel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0010
rows.name:
The intel was fake, of course. Just
some sham to give to the group that
was trying to steal it for reals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0011
rows.name:
And today was the day I sprung the
trap and arrested the conspirators![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0012
rows.name:
So what do you think?
Preeetty neat, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_JNK0030
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: tev001893_SEL0031
rows.name:
Say that her plan seems to have
been executed flawlessly.

rows.label: tev001893_JNK0040
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: tev001893_SEL0041
rows.name:
Joke that only Miia would come up
with something this complicated.

rows.label: tev001893_JNK0050
rows.name: Bluff

rows.label: tev001893_SEL0051
rows.name:
Claim that you had it
figured out from the start.

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0013
rows.name: Aw! Thanks, Chief![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0014
rows.name:
I had a lot of support from Sakuraba Industries,
but I'm still pretty pumped that I was able
to capture the criminals all by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0015
rows.name:
This mission has really given
me a lot of confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm gonna keep taking harder and harder
missions, and before you know it, you'll have
a new rival on your hands! A RIVAL! So cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0017
rows.name:
Except that YOUR constant interference
almost blew the whole darn thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0018
rows.name:
But thankfully my expert improvisation
saved the day and brought the
mission to a flawless end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0019
rows.name:
Also, doing it all by myself really
helped to boost my confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm gonna keep taking harder and harder
missions, and before you know it, you'll have
a new rival on your hands! A RIVAL! So cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0021
rows.name:
You are so full of it, Chief.
You're like a silo! Or...some other
building that's full of stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0022
rows.name:
I guess I've grown so much as a BLADE
that even you can't believe it, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0023
rows.name:
Although I must admit that I DID
have a lot of support from Sakuraba
Industries this time around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001893_MSG0024
rows.name:
Still, I'm gonna keep taking harder missions,
and before you know it, you'll have a new
rival on your hands! A RIVAL! So cool.[ST:wait ]
